# DOCX Reference GB/T 7714 Repair
## When to Use
Use when the user provides a DOCX thesis or format-check report and asks to fix reference formatting, numbering, page ranges, GB/T 7714 types, or bibliography errors.
## Do Not Use When
Do not use to write new research content, search arXiv only, or verify whether an unrelated paper exists.
## Required Inputs
A DOCX file, format report, reference list, bibliography, or local PDF evidence.
## Workflow
1. Read the format-check report and original reference section.
2. Match citations against bibliography and PDFs.
3. Repair numbering, type markers, page ranges, punctuation, and GB/T 7714 fields.
4. Save the corrected document and verification notes.
